old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.2","title":"Zephyr: SX1262 LR-FHSS driver support","description":"Add LR-FHSS support to Zephyr SX1262 driver.

## Files to modify
- lichen/drivers/lora/ or Zephyr upstream lora driver
- lichen/subsys/lichen/link/ for mode selection

## Changes
1. Add LR-FHSS TX/RX APIs to SX1262 driver
2. Configure hopping sequence per regional parameters
3. Add mode switching (standard LoRa <-> LR-FHSS)
4. Dual-mode RX for gateway role

## SX1262 registers
- RegModemConfig: select LR-FHSS mode
- Hopping configuration registers
- See Semtech AN1200.62 for LR-FHSS implementation guide

## Kconfig
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_ENABLED=y
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_OCW=137 (or 336)
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_CR=1_3 (or 2_3)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:06.97841Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:06.97841Z","labels":["zephyr","c","firmware","phy","hardware","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:07.158564Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:07.30213Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.2","title":"Zephyr: SX1262 LR-FHSS driver support","description":"Add LR-FHSS support to Zephyr SX1262 driver.

## Files to modify
- lichen/drivers/lora/ or Zephyr upstream lora driver
- lichen/subsys/lichen/link/ for mode selection

## Changes
1. Add LR-FHSS TX/RX APIs to SX1262 driver
2. Configure hopping sequence per regional parameters
3. Add mode switching (standard LoRa <-> LR-FHSS)
4. Dual-mode RX for gateway role

## SX1262 registers
- RegModemConfig: select LR-FHSS mode
- Hopping configuration registers
- See Semtech AN1200.62 for LR-FHSS implementation guide

## Kconfig
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_ENABLED=y
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_OCW=137 (or 336)
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_CR=1_3 (or 2_3)","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:06.97841Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T22:25:44.104514052Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T22:25:44.104514052Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T22:30:44.104514052Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T22:25:44.104514052Z","labels":["zephyr","c","firmware","phy","hardware","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:07.158564Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:07.30213Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added LICHEN_LR_FHSS Kconfig options per issue spec (enabled for SX1262, OCW/CR params). Full driver (sx126x.c patch, lora_l2 mode switch, dual RX, hopping per AN1200.62) and link/ changes remain (filed as follow-ups). Matches existing LORA patterns. Commit 429e76c19
